character_designs.identity: Upper-intelligence insectoid Suming central inspector and executor of the Qingming Register plan

body_and_face.species_lock: Highly human-like upper-intelligence insectoid official; insect identity is carried by compound eyes, height, slender proportions, elongated hands, a single thin rear money-tail / rat-tail pigtail, and restrained wing-membrane language.
body_and_face.height_and_build: Over 2 meters tall, narrow, vertical, and unnervingly still; very slender official presence rather than muscular warrior mass.
body_and_face.face: Cold handsome near-human official face with long refined proportions, narrow jaw, high bridge, thin lips, clean bone-white insect-wax complexion, and large almond-shaped black compound eyes in human eye positions. The eyes have no sclera, iris, or normal pupil; they read as wet black obsidian compound-eye surfaces with visible dense micro-lens dots, honeycomb-like grain, and granular highlights. No ugly insect head, skull mask, beak, mandibles, or white monster face plate.
body_and_face.head: High cylindrical Qingming official hat covers the hair area, with vertical seams, wax fasteners, and cold-gold pins. A single thin low back money-tail / rat-tail pigtail must hang from the bald occiput or from under the rear edge of the official hat; no full human hair, bangs, side hair, or modern ponytail.
body_and_face.posture: Ritual stillness, clean hands, controlled gestures, low emotional display.

constant_anchors: single thin rear money-tail / rat-tail pigtail
large almond-shaped black compound eyes with visible micro-lens dots
thin vertical white straps or bead chains

state_designs.silhouette: Full vertical white official silhouette with high hat, hard collar, broad but thin membrane shoulder cape, and long robe.
materials: white register paper and wax-bound cover
state_designs.color_logic: Insect-wax white and bone white dominate; black sun and compound-eye black create authority contrast; cold gold is minimal and institutional.
state_designs.damage_level: No dust, no travel damage, no blood staining; pressure comes from impossible cleanliness.
required_details: small locked Qingming institutional mark visible
near-human face reads cold and handsome rather than monstrous
large black compound eyes clearly replace ordinary human eyes, with no sclera, iris, or pupil
compound-eye micro-lens texture is visible enough to read in close-up
height and body read over 2 meters and extremely slender
single thin rear pigtail visible from back or side

state_designs.episode_range: public office, formal declaration, Qingming institutional scenes
state_designs.silhouette: Most human-official in outline: tall high hat, long robe, straight front placket, hanging white straps, ceremonial stillness.
state_designs.color_logic: Near-monochrome Qingming palette with black sun authority and cold-gold hierarchy points.
required_details: formal state must keep a near-human handsome face
large black compound-eye surfaces remain visible in normal eye positions
hat covers the hair area while a single thin rear pigtail remains visible
institutional badge usage is small and locked, not redesigned

state_designs.silhouette: Narrowed official robe with membrane cape folded closer to arms and back; ready to walk, track, and screen but still not a fighter's armor.
state_designs.color_logic: White official slice inserted into any region; cold-white incense is a tracking line, not an attack effect.
state_designs.damage_level: No dirt or rips; travel only changes silhouette, not cleanliness.
required_details: incense thread touches cloth edge or floats as a thin cold line
insect-wax needle remains a clean tool
no black armor, no lower-tier mantis anatomy

detail_panels.purpose: Prevent Bai Yi from becoming an ugly insect head while keeping his insect caste legible.
detail_panels.notes: Cold handsome near-human face, long refined proportions, bone-white insect-wax complexion, large almond-shaped black compound eyes in human eye positions, visible micro-lens dots, wet obsidian highlights, granular reflections, no sclera, iris, or ordinary human pupils.

detail_panels.purpose: Lock the high Qingming official silhouette.
detail_panels.notes: High cylindrical hat integrated with head shell, vertical seams, wax plates, cold-gold pins, one thin rear money-tail / rat-tail pigtail exiting under the back edge.

detail_panels.purpose: Lock the insect caste bald-head identifier requested for all bald insectoid designs.
detail_panels.notes: Single thin low pigtail at the back of the bald head, like a money-tail / rat-tail queue; not loose hair, not full human hair, not a modern ponytail.

detail_panels.purpose: Use existing Qingming badge language without redesign.
detail_panels.notes: Small institutional mark on collar, chest, seal, or register; no new crest.
Transparent rigid membrane, vein texture, formal shoulder cape; not soft feather wings.

detail_panels.purpose: Connect Bai Yi to screening and memory interrogation.
detail_panels.notes: Long clean hand, subtly insect-jointed fingers, insect-wax needle in tray or between fingers.
Book corner, wax seal, no readable names or text.

detail_panels.purpose: Lock pursuit tool as low magic.
detail_panels.notes: Thin cold-white smoke thread clinging to cloth edge; no attack spell.

detail_panels.purpose: Keep the official figure visibly non-human in close-up.
detail_panels.notes: Dark soft membrane between face plate, collar, and robe; hints at chitin beneath.

negative_rules: ordinary human official wearing a mask
